heading: Transfer of lands for State Park
label: 81n Transfer of lands for State Park
text: The Secretary is further authorized to transfer without compensation up to fifteen acres of the Colonial National Historical Park, Virginia, to the Commonwealth of Virginia for use by agencies of the Commonwealth in the establishment of a State Park in furtherance of the purposes of the Colonial National Historical Park.
notes: CodificationSection was not enacted as part of , , which comprises this subchapter.act July 3, 1930, ch. 83746 Stat. 855
